lessons.content: {"simpleExplanation":"An embedded system is a specialized computing system designed to perform a dedicated function or a set of functions, often in real time, within a larger mechanical or electrical system. lessons.title: UART – Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter
lessons.content: {"simpleExplanation":"UART is a hardware communication protocol that enables asynchronous serial communication. This means that data is sent without a clock signal. lessons.content: {"simpleExplanation":"Interfacing sensors with microcontrollers is a fundamental aspect of embedded systems.
